message:
fix: ensure dog lock directory exists before flock (gt-f2h87)

lockDog did not call os.MkdirAll before creating the flock, causing
flock.Lock() to fail when the dog directory didn't exist yet. This
matches the pattern already used by lockPolecat and lockPool in
polecat/manager.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
